description: Runtime agent context for D-Comp Orchestrator agents. Paths are relative to the decomp-orchestrator repo root. Melee knowledge source definitions, APIs, data, indexes, and graph resources live under projects/melee/knowledge; reusable GameCube tool definitions live under toolpacks/gamecube-decomp; project tool bindings/data live under projects/melee; role behavior lives beside the server agents package.

rank_decomp_candidates.purpose: Rank fuzzy functions and linked blocker units from build/GALE01/report.json.

decomp_context_lookup.purpose: Search local code, report metadata, PR history, and resource CSVs for one target.

scaffold_decomp_run.purpose: Create a reproducible decomp-runs/<slug> experimental search bundle.

summarize_objdiff_json.purpose: Summarize objdiff JSON for experimental search result rows.

render_progress_charts.purpose: Render experimental search progress, Pareto, and mismatch SVG charts.

fetch_recent_pr_dump.purpose: Fetch missing GitHub PR metadata, comments, reviews, and diffs into the orchestrator-owned past-PR dump.

build_pr_postmortems.purpose: Build searchable per-PR JSON knowledge records and shared Pi-agent prompt standards.

sync_repo_and_pr_library.purpose: Fetch/rebase the local repo and sync missing orchestrator-owned PR knowledge entries.
